zh.lifeSummary: Katherine Bunce是Mr. Bunce的女兒，於大約1615年出生在英國。她於大約1645年與William Clark在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1683年8月3日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德哈達姆享年69歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德哈達姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Katherine Bunce是Mr. Bunce的女儿，于大约1615年出生在英国。她于大约1645年与William Clark在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1683年8月3日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德哈達姆享年69岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德哈達姆。

nameMeanings.name: Bunce
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Bunt , Bunn or Bone , with post-medieval excrescent -s.
Americanized form of South German Bunz: from Alemannic bunz ‘little barrel’, hence a nickname for a short fat man; or from a pet form of an Old High German personal name Bun(n)o.
Americanized form of German   Banz  . Compare   Bunts  .

variants.name: Bunts
meanings: Americanized form of German Bunz (see Bunce ) or Banz .
English: variant of   Bunce  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Bunt
meanings: English: from an unrecorded Middle English bunt ‘something swollen’, related to modern English bunt ‘swelling, bag-like end of a net or sail’, and to Middle English bunting ‘small bird, corn bunting’. The name could have been a nickname given to a plump person. Derivation from Middle English bonte, bunte ‘sieve’ is formally also possible but less likely.
English: alternatively, from an unrecorded Middle English personal name Bunt(e), Old English Bunt(a), perhaps derived from the same sense as in 1 above.
Dutch (mainly Van de Bunt): habitational name for someone who lived at a place called after its vegetation, which consisted of bunt grass, i.e. a meadow with tufts of a tough kind of grass.

variants.name: Bones
meanings: Irish: translation into English of Gaelic Ó Cnáimhsighe, by association with cnámh ‘bone’. Compare Bonar 2.

Norwegian: habitational name from the farm name Bones in the province of Trøndelag. The first element is derived from the river name Bua, from Old Norse búa ‘live’, perhaps meaning ‘river that runs through a settled valley’. The second element is nes ‘promontory, headland’. Compare Boness and Bonnes .

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: Katherine Bunce was born about 1615, in England as the daughter of Mr. Bunce. She married William Clark about 1645, in Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 3 August 1683, in Haddam, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 69, and was buried in Haddam, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Katherine Bunce est née environ 1615, à Angleterre, fille de Mr. Bunce. Elle a épousé William Clark environ 1645, à Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 août 1683, à Haddam, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à Haddam, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Katherine Bunce wurde um 1615 in England, als Tochter von Mr. Bunce geboren. Sie hat um 1645 in Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America William Clark geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. August 1683 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Haddam, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Haddam, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Katherine Bunce è nata il circa 1615 nel England come figlia di Mr. Bunce. Lei sposato William Clark circa 1645, nel Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 3 agosto 1683, nel Haddam, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolta a Haddam, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Bunceは約1615年にイギリスでMr. Bunceの娘として生まれた。約1645年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州でWilliam Clarkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1683年8月3日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードハッドアムで69歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードハッドアムにて埋葬された。

ko.Hartford, Hartford, Colony of Connecticu: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 하트퍼드

ko.Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut, Britis: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 노르폴크
ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Bunce(은)는 대략 1615년 영국에서 Mr. Bunce의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1645년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주에서 William Clark(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1683년 8월 3일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 하다에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 하다에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Katherine Bunce nasceu aproximadamente 1615, em Inglaterra filha de Mr. Bunce. Ela casou-se com William Clark aproximadamente 1645, em Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de agosto de 1683, em Haddam, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 69 anos, e foi sepultada em Haddam, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Katherine Bunce родилась около 1615 г. в местности Англия. Её отца звали Mr. Bunce. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Clark около 1645 г. в местности Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 3 августа 1683 г. в местности хаддам, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности хаддам, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Katherine Bunce nació aproximadamente 1615, en Inglaterra como hija de Mr. Bunce. Se casó con William Clark aproximadamente 1645, en Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 3 de agosto de 1683, en Haddam, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultada en Haddam, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.
